DEB9247E4B802ED69E0BA8BAC2D05462: <EmphA>Captain Flintlocke</> has touched down on the shores of Breakwater Bluffs. Something’s got that salty ol’ air pirate shaking in his boots. Better find out what it is!
650C297B49016D43CEF143ACDDF7A310: Flintlocke lost his airship fleet to some kind of fearsome creature on the Misty Isle off the coast. Travel there to win Airship Part Tomes to build an airship of your own. You’ll need Unknowable Energy to lure out the creature.
52B9C1C24FC18F62A74DDA8472A07A57: <EmphA>The Thing From Beneath</> has a few more <EmphA>Airship Part Tomes</> rattling around in its belly. If you can find several more, you may have enough Parts to build your very own airship!
